qaPairs.triggerText: Hey, thanks for meeting up! This place is cozy, right?
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 嗨，谢谢你来见面！这地方挺温馨的，对吧？
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 如果是 user_responds 模式，服务方可能先打招呼或介绍环境

followUps.text: Yeah, I love spots like this—perfect for chatting.
followUps.text_cn: 对啊，我喜欢这种地方，特别适合聊天。

followUps.text: Definitely! I’ve been wanting to try this café for weeks.
followUps.text_cn: 确实！我早就想来这家咖啡馆了。

qaPairs.usageNote: 用感叹句表达兴趣，避免只说‘嗯’

subScenes.name: 寻找共同点
subScenes.description: 通过兴趣开启深入对话

qaPairs.triggerText: So, what do you usually do to unwind after work?
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 那你平时下班后怎么放松啊？
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 例如：你最近有什么兴趣爱好？

followUps.text: I’m big into hiking—last weekend I hit the trails near the lake.
followUps.text_cn: 我喜欢徒步，上周末去了湖边的小路。

followUps.text: Honestly? Binge-watching shows and eating ice cream.
followUps.text_cn: 说实话？追剧加吃冰淇淋。

qaPairs.usageNote: 用具体例子回应，别只说‘看电影’

qaPairs.triggerText: No way! I just hiked the same trail last month—was the view as epic as you said?
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 真的吗？我上个月刚走过那条路，风景真有你说的那么棒？
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 例如：你最近有什么兴趣爱好？

followUps.text: Absolutely! I even saw a deer at sunrise—so surreal.
followUps.text_cn: 太棒了！日出时还看到一只鹿，超梦幻。

followUps.text: Kinda, but it was kinda crowded.

qaPairs.usageNote: 用‘No way!’等表达惊喜，强化连接感

subScenes.name: 表达兴趣
subScenes.description: 自然流露好感，不显刻意

qaPairs.triggerText: You seem super passionate about photography—what’s your favorite shot ever?
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 你好像超爱摄影，拍过最满意的一张是哪张？
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 如果是 user_responds 模式，场景可能是服务人员询问顾客需求

followUps.text: It’s a photo I took at dawn in Kyoto—everything was quiet, just mist and temples.
followUps.text_cn: 是我在京都清晨拍的，全是雾气和寺庙，特别安静。

followUps.text: I’d love to see it sometime—maybe over coffee next week?
followUps.text_cn: 我想看看，下周还能约咖啡吗？

qaPairs.usageNote: 回应后顺势邀约，自然过渡到下次见面

subScenes.name: 礼貌邀约
subScenes.description: 提出下次见面，语气轻松不压力

qaPairs.triggerText: I’ve really enjoyed talking with you tonight—would you be up for grabbing brunch next Sunday?
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 今晚和你聊天超开心，周日要不要一起吃早午餐？
qaPairs.scenarioHintCn: 场景提示：用户提出邀约，服务方/工作人员接受或婉拒

followUps.text: That sounds perfect—I’ve been dying to try that new spot downtown.
followUps.text_cn: 太好了！我正想试试市中心那家新店。

followUps.text: Hmm, I’m kinda busy that weekend.
Sure! How about 11? I know a great pancake place.
followUps.text_cn: 好啊！11点行吗？我知道家超棒的煎饼店。

qaPairs.usageNote: 用‘I’ve been dying to...’表达期待，增强吸引力

qaPairs.triggerText: I should head out soon—this was such a great night.
qaPairs.triggerTextCn: 我该走了，今晚聊得太开心了。

followUps.text: Same here! Can’t wait for Sunday—have a safe trip home!
followUps.text_cn: 我也是！等周日见，路上小心！

followUps.text: You too! Text me if you change your mind about pancakes 😊
followUps.text_cn: 你也是！要是改主意想吃煎饼记得找我哦😊

qaPairs.usageNote: 用表情符号或轻松语气收尾，减轻压力
